# HYWE (Hygrid Woven Ensemble)

> Browser-based design sandbox for procedural spatial configurations and design computation.

## Technical Essence
HYWE (**Hy**grid **W**oven **E**nsemble) is an F#-driven, browser-native engine that uses procedural logic to transform "structured intent" into spatial topologies. It leverages a **Hygrid** (hybrid-grid) system to **weave** spatial definitions into a cohesive ensemble, focusing on flow-based hierarchy and sequence-driven layout generation.

## Key Features
- **Procedural Engine**: Built from scratch in F# using Bolero (WASM).
- **Topology-First**: Focuses on spatial flow and connections rather than static geometry.
- **Hybrid Rendering**: Real-time 2D visualization via SVG and 3D volumetric massing via WebGPU.
- **Zero-Backend**: All computations, parsing, and rendering happen locally in the user's browser.
- **HYWE Strings**: A custom compact string representation for spatial layouts (Lexel module).

## Architecture for AI Agents
- **Core Logic**: `Hywe.Tree` library (functional logic for hierarchical spatial structures).
- **Frontend**: Blazor/Bolero-based SPA (`Hywe.Web`).
- **Parsing**: `Lexel` module handles string-to-model translation.
- **Geometry**: `Xyxel` (2D layout) and `Zaxel` (3D extrusion) modules.
- **Rendering**: `VZ-ThreeD` (WebGPU pipeline) and `VZ-Graphics` (SVG).
- **Data Pipeline**: `Hynteract` (associated private serverless pipeline) collects HYWE Syntax and design intent, committing structured `.jsonl` records to the [HYWE Architectural Training Data](https://huggingface.co/datasets/vykrum/hywe-training-data) dataset on Hugging Face.

## Primary URL
https://hywe.in/

## Repository
https://github.com/vykrum/Hywe

## Data Pipeline
- **Hynteract**: Private associated pipeline (not publicly available)
- **Training Dataset**: https://huggingface.co/datasets/vykrum/hywe-training-data

[llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt)
